summary: Finance Revenue Split & Invoice Payment History feature fully tested. All 8 features verified: Backend APIs return correct data structure (earned_revenue cash basis, invoiced_revenue accrual, revenue_mode='cash', invoices with payments[] array, totals with subtotal/vat/total/paid/unpaid). Frontend Finance tab displays all Bulgarian labels correctly, chevron toggle expands payment history, summary row shows all 5 totals.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing project c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da with invoice INV-1007 (total=30000, paid=10000) and 1 payment allocation of 10000 BGN via BankTransfer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance Revenue Split feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/projects/{projectId}/financial-results returns operating.earned_revenue (cash only - actual paid amounts), operating.invoiced_revenue (accrual - total invoiced), and revenue_mode='cash'. 2) GET /api/projects/{projectId}/dashboard returns invoices with payments[] array containing {id, amount, date, method, reference, note}, and totals with {subtotal, vat, total, paid, unpaid}. 3) Frontend Finance tab shows FinancialResultsCard with 3 cards (Ликвидност/Cash, Оперативен резултат/Operating, Реален резултат/Fully Loaded). Operating card shows 'Фактурирано (начислено)' for invoiced_revenue and 'Реално платено (касов приход)' in green for earned_revenue. 4) Invoice list (data-testid='invoice-list-payments') shows invoice rows with chevron toggle (data-testid='invoice-toggle-{id}'). 5) Expanded payment history (data-testid='invoice-payments-{id}') shows date, amount, method in Bulgarian (Банков превод), reference. 6) Summary row (data-testid='invoices-summary') shows 5 columns: Без ДДС, ДДС, С ДДС, Платено (green), Чакащо (amber). 7) Overview tab Balance card shows 'Платено от клиент' (income) correctly using only paid amounts, not inflated by unpaid invoices.

GET /api/projects/{projectId}/financial-: Contains operating section with earned_revenue (cash basis)
Contains operating section with invoiced_revenue (accrual basis)
GET /api/projects/{projectId}/dashboard: Contains invoices section with invoices list
Contains invoices.totals with subtotal, vat, total, paid, unpaid
Each invoice has subtotal, vat_amount, total, paid_amount, remaining_amount
Payment allocations have amount, date, method, reference
Balance section income equals invoices.totals.paid (cash basis)
specific_project_data: INV-1007 has payment allocation of 10000 BGN

finance_tab: Operating card shows 'Реално платено (касов приход)' for earned_revenue in green
Invoice rows show invoice_no, client_name, status badge
Invoice rows show Без ДДС/ДДС/С ДДС breakdown
Expanded payment history shows date, amount, method (Bulgarian), reference
Summary labels: Без ДДС, ДДС, С ДДС, Платено (green), Чакащо (amber)
overview_tab: Shows 'Платено от клиент' (income) - not inflated by unpaid invoices

i18n_bulgarian: Summary labels: Без ДДС, ДДС, С ДДС, Платено, Чакащо
